# Dashboard configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/dashboard.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: Dashboard
metadata:
  workspace: movielens
  name: genre-analysis
  title: Genre Analysis
  description: Genre-level rating volume, rating quality, trends, and release-decade comparisons.
  tags: [movies, genres, ratings, experiment]
spec:
  semanticModel: genre_ratings
  filters:
    rating_date:
      type: date_range
      label: Rating date
      url_param: period
      from_url_param: from
      to_url_param: to
      field: rating_genres.rating_date
      default:
        preset: all
      presets:
        - value: all
          label: All time
        - value: "2023"
          label: "2023"
          from: "2023-01-01"
          to: "2023-12-31"
    genre:
      type: multi_select
      label: Genre
      url_param: genre
      operator: in
      values:
        source: distinct
        limit: 30
      field: rating_genres.genre
    release_decade:
      type: multi_select
      label: Release decade
      url_param: decade
      operator: in
      values:
        source: distinct
        limit: 20
      field: rating_genres.release_decade
  visuals:
    genre_rating_count:
      kind: kpi
      shape: single_value
      query:
        measures:
          genre_rating_count:
      options:
        note: Rating-genre rows
        tone: ink
    average_rating:
      kind: kpi
      shape: single_value
      query:
        measures:
          average_rating:
      options:
        note: Mean rating
        tone: amber
    active_users:
      kind: kpi
      shape: single_value
      query:
        measures:
          active_users:
      options:
        note: Distinct users
        tone: green
    rated_movies:
      kind: kpi
      shape: single_value
      query:
        measures:
          rated_movies:
      options:
        note: Distinct movies
        tone: coral
    ratings_by_genre:
      title: Ratings by genre
      type: bar
      query:
        dimensions:
          genre: rating_genres.genre
        measures:
          genre_rating_count:
        sort:
          - field: value
            direction: desc
        limit: 20
    average_by_genre:
      title: Average rating by genre
      type: bar
      query:
        dimensions:
          genre: rating_genres.genre
        measures:
          average_rating:
        sort:
          - field: value
            direction: desc
        limit: 20
    genre_trend:
      title: Genre ratings by year
      shape: category_series_value
      renderer: echarts
      type: column
      options:
        stacked: true
      query:
        dimensions:
          rating_year: rating_genres.rating_year
        series:
          field: rating_genres.genre
          alias: genre
        measures:
          genre_rating_count:
        sort:
          - field: rating_year
            direction: asc
        limit: 120
    decade_genres:
      title: Release decade by genre
      shape: matrix
      renderer: echarts
      type: heatmap
      query:
        dimensions:
          decade: rating_genres.release_decade
          genre: rating_genres.genre
        measures:
          average_rating:
        sort:
          - field: decade
            direction: asc
          - field: genre
            direction: asc
        limit: 240
  pages:
    - name: overview
      title: Overview
      canvas:
        width: 1366
        height: 920
      grid:
        columns: 12
        row_height: 48
        gap: 16
        padding: 16
      visuals:
        - id: rating-date-filter
          kind: filter_card
          filter: rating_date
          placement: {col: 1, row: 1, col_span: 4, row_span: 2}
        - id: genre-filter
          kind: filter_card
          filter: genre
          placement: {col: 5, row: 1, col_span: 4, row_span: 2}
        - id: decade-filter
          kind: filter_card
          filter: release_decade
          placement: {col: 9, row: 1, col_span: 4, row_span: 2}
        - id: genre-ratings
          kind: kpi_card
          visual: genre_rating_count
          placement: {col: 1, row: 4, col_span: 3, row_span: 3}
        - id: average-rating
          kind: kpi_card
          visual: average_rating
          placement: {col: 4, row: 4, col_span: 3, row_span: 3}
        - id: active-users
          kind: kpi_card
          visual: active_users
          placement: {col: 7, row: 4, col_span: 3, row_span: 3}
        - id: rated-movies
          kind: kpi_card
          visual: rated_movies
          placement: {col: 10, row: 4, col_span: 3, row_span: 3}
        - id: ratings-by-genre
          kind: bar_chart
          visual: ratings_by_genre
          placement: {col: 1, row: 8, col_span: 6, row_span: 7}
        - id: average-by-genre
          kind: bar_chart
          visual: average_by_genre
          placement: {col: 7, row: 8, col_span: 6, row_span: 7}
        - id: genre-trend
          kind: column_chart
          visual: genre_trend
          placement: {col: 1, row: 16, col_span: 6, row_span: 7}
        - id: decade-genres
          kind: heatmap_chart
          visual: decade_genres
          placement: {col: 7, row: 16, col_span: 6, row_span: 7}
```
